title: "Hold Our Peace or Go And Tell?" II Kings 7:1-20

notes.introduction: An exposition of 2 Kings 7:1-20 on the four leprous men who discovered the abandoned Syrian camp during the siege of Samaria, with spiritual application to the New Testament believer's responsibility to share the gospel rather than withhold it.
themes: spiritual application of old testament narrative
holding peace versus proclaiming good news

sections.heading: Setting: Siege and Famine in Samaria
Elisha's Prophecy and the Doubting Lord
The Four Lepers: Their Reasoning and Departure
The Empty Syrian Camp: What They Received
Spiritual Application for New Testament Believers
The Call to Go and Tell
